name: intent
description: Quick intent capture from system tray

scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.main.json && node scripts/build-renderer.js && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p=require('path');['index.html','styles.css'].forEach(f=>fs.copyFileSync(p.join('src','renderer',f),p.join('dist','renderer',f)))"
scripts.rebuild:electron: node -e "const v=require('electron/package.json').version; const {execSync}=require('child_process'); process.stdout.write('[rebuild] Rebuilding better-sqlite3 for Electron '+v+'...'); execSync('npx --yes node-gyp rebuild --target='+v+' --arch='+process.arch+' --dist-url=https://electronjs.org/headers --runtime=electron', {cwd:'node_modules/better-sqlite3', stdio:'pipe'}); console.log(' done')"
scripts.start: npm run build && npm run rebuild:electron && electron .
scripts.dev: npm run build && npm run rebuild:electron && (tsc -p tsconfig.main.json -w --preserveWatchOutput --declaration false --sourceMap false & node scripts/build-renderer.js --watch & node scripts/watch-assets.js & electronmon .)
scripts.dev:packaged: npm run build:mac && open build/mac-arm64/Copilot\ Intent.app

extendInfo.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Copilot Intent needs microphone access for voice input.
